name: Submariner
description: The dive-watch archetype: a unidirectional rotating bezel with a 60-minute scale, a round Oyster case with broad shoulders, and the unmistakable Mercedes hour hand. Bold round and baton indices with thick lume frames, and a date at 3 o'clock under a Cyclops lens on most references.

name: Cosmograph Daytona
description: Identify the Daytona by its three sub-dials set inside the main dial, the three pushers on the right (a screw-down crown flanked by two chronograph buttons), and the tachymetre 'units per hour' scale engraved on the bezel. It may come in variants like: white 'Panda' dial, black dial, and the vintage 'Paul Newman'.

name: Datejust
description: Identify the Datejust by its classic round case, the date at 3 o'clock under a Cyclops lens, and most often a fluted bezel paired with a Jubilee bracelet. It may come in variants like: silver dial, blue dial, champagne dial, and smooth or fluted bezels.

name: GMT-Master II
description: Identify the GMT-Master II by its two-colour 24-hour rotating bezel and the extra arrow-tipped GMT hand that tracks a second time zone. It may come in variants like: blue-and-red 'Pepsi', black-and-red 'Coke', blue-and-black 'Batman', and brown-and-gold 'Root Beer'.

name: Explorer
description: Identify the Explorer by its clean, highly legible black dial with bold 3-6-9 Arabic numerals, a simple smooth bezel, and no date. It may come in variants like: the classic 36mm black dial and the two-tone Rolesor.

name: Day-Date
description: Identify the Day-Date (President) by the day of the week spelled out in full in an arc window at 12 o'clock plus the date at 3, the semi-circular-link President bracelet, and a case only ever in precious metal. It may come in variants like: champagne dial, green dial, and ice-blue platinum.

name: Oyster Perpetual
description: Identify the Oyster Perpetual by its time-only dial with no date and no Cyclops, a smooth bezel, and clean baton markers — the purest Rolex. It may come in variants like: turquoise, coral red, green, yellow, and candy-pink lacquer dials.
